query: SELECT shelfCode, shelfLevel, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(facingCount) as total_facings, MAX(facingCount) as max_facing FROM shelf_data WHERE shelfCode = '食品1' AND sessionId = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM upload_sessions) GROUP BY shelfCode, shelfLevel ORDER BY shelfLevel;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user zukVVkxLUvLkVbD.0e7b3f4e91a8 --database mK5cPqBYGvPvZaJg4dkNDx --execute SELECT shelfCode, shelfLevel, COUNT(*) as items, SUM(facingCount) as total_facings, MAX(facingCount) as max_facing FROM shelf_data WHERE shelfCode = '食品1' AND sessionId = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM upload_sessions) GROUP BY shelfCode, shelfLevel ORDER BY shelfLevel;
